fields.label: Enable Axle Energy VPP
fields.help: Turn on automatic response to grid events

fields.label: Axle API Key
fields.help: Your Axle Energy API authentication token

fields.label: Normal Polling Interval (minutes)
fields.help: Minutes between API checks when no event is active

fields.label: Fast Polling Interval (seconds)
fields.help: Seconds between API checks when an event is approaching or active

fields.label: Fast Poll Window (hours)
fields.help: Hours before event start to begin fast polling

fields.label: Event Buffer (minutes)
fields.help: Start export this many minutes before event, and continue this many minutes after it ends

fields.label: Export Power Level (0–50)
fields.help: Maximum discharge power during events (50 = maximum export)

fields.label: Minimum Battery SOC (%)
fields.help: Stop discharging when battery reaches this level
